title: Zero Vector — Job to Be Done
description: Captures a job to be done: what the user is trying to accomplish, in what context, and how well current solutions serve them.

job_statement.description: The job statement in JTBD format: When [situation], I want to [motivation], so I can [outcome]

context.description: The situation or trigger that creates this job

current_solutions.description: Tools, workarounds, or methods users currently employ for this job

desired_outcome.description: What success looks like when this job is done well

importance.description: How important this job is to the user

satisfaction.description: How well current solutions satisfy this job
